settings.title: Returns & Exchange Policy
settings.body:
Our Promise

We want you to love every piece from A Charkha Story. If something isn't right, we're here to help — no questions asked within our return window.

15-Day Easy Returns

You can return any non-sale item within 15 days of delivery. To be eligible for a return:

  • Items must be unused, unwashed, and unaltered
  • Original tags must be attached
  • Item must be in its original packaging

How to Return

  1. Contact us via WhatsApp or email with your order number
  2. We'll arrange a free pickup from your address (within India)
  3. Once received and inspected, your refund will be processed within 5-7 business days

Exchanges

Want a different size, colour, or product? We offer free exchanges within 15 days. Simply let us know and we'll arrange the swap — pickup and re-delivery are on us.

Refund Method

Refunds are issued to the original payment method:

  • UPI / Wallet: 1-3 business days
  • Credit / Debit Card: 5-7 business days
  • Net Banking: 5-7 business days
  • COD orders: Refund via bank transfer (NEFT)

Non-Returnable Items

  • Items purchased on sale or with discount codes
  • Customised or personalised products
  • Gift cards
  • Fabrics (yardage) once cut

Damaged or Defective Items

If you receive a damaged or defective product, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos. We will replace the item at no cost or issue a full refund.
settings.contact_text: Email hello@acharkhastory.com or WhatsApp +91-99999-99999. We reply within 24 hours.
